title: FetchResult v1
description: Verbatim text fetch from the indexed corpus. Discriminated by `kind`. All text is normalized markdown sourced from `CanonicalDocument` / `chunks.text` — original raw bytes are not exposed. PDF / audio span fetch returns `error.v1.code = span_not_supported`.

text.description: kind=doc/span: markdown text (truncated if budget tripped)

effective_end.description: kind=span: actual end line of emitted text (1-based, inclusive). Equals `line_end` on full slice; less than `line_end` when (a) requested range exceeded total lines (line clamp) or (b) `--max-tokens` budget trimmed the tail. Special case: `line_start - 1` (which is 0 when line_start=1) signals the entire requested range was beyond doc end — returned `text` is empty.

truncated.description: kind=doc/span: budget forced text truncation. Always false for chunk.
